use std::process::Command;

fn process_files(paths: &[&str]) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for path in paths {
        // BAD: spawns a new process per item
        let output = Command::new("wc")
            .arg("-l")
            .arg(path)
            .output()
            .expect("failed to run wc");
        results.push(String::from_utf8_lossy(&output.stdout).to_string());
    }
    results
}
